name: The Back Nine Golf | Pflugerville, TX
about: The Back Nine Golf in Pflugerville, TX, is a golf simulation venue that offers a modern space for golfers to practice their game. The venue is designed to provide a convenient environment for players of all skill levels to enjoy virtual golf experiences. With a focus on accessibility and technology, it aims to be a go-to destination for those looking to play or practice golf indoors.
why_golfers_like_it: Suitable for players of all skill levels
Great for solo practice or group play

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

faq.answer: Time for 18 holes may vary depending on simulator usage and pace of play; contact the venue for details.

faq.answer: The venue is generally welcoming to families, though specific amenities or programs for children are not detailed.
